description_long: This object consists of three hard-shell suitcases, each with a distinct color: red, blue, and dark gray. The suitcases are upright, each equipped with four swivel wheels for easy maneuverability. The red suitcase features a telescopic handle extended from the top, while the blue and gray suitcases have their handles retracted. Each suitcase has a unique V-shaped accent on the front, with the red and gray cases displaying colored highlights. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, with visible seams and zippers running along the edges for access to the main compartments. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for travel in urban environments.
description: A set of three hard-shell, wheeled suitcases in red, blue, and gray, each with a telescopic handle and V-shaped front accents. The cases have smooth, glossy surfaces and visible zippers for main compartment access.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three suitcases side by side, with the red suitcase's telescopic handle extended and V-shaped accents visible on each case.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profiles of the stacked suitcases, with the red suitcase's handle slightly protruding.
description_view_2: Rear view of the suitcases, highlighting the back panels and the retracted handles of the blue and gray cases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red suitcase's handle and the side profiles of all three cases.
attribute_handle_type: one telescopic top handle (red suitcase, extended), two retracted top handles (blue and gray suitcases), side handles present on all cases
attribute_zipper_configuration: one main zipper track per suitcase, located along the perimeter; double zipper pulls visible on each main compartment
